name: workflow-pagamentos
description: Sistema de Workflow de Validação e Pagamento de Notas Fiscais e Boletos

scripts.dev: npm --prefix backend run dev & npm --prefix packages/frontend run dev
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix packages/frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix packages/frontend run lint
scripts.type-check: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/frontend run type-check
